featured.title: OrkaIntel
featured.problem: Investigations stall when the signal is spread across disconnected public-data sources — no single dataset shows how entities actually connect.
featured.approach: A GraphRAG platform that resolves entities across public data and runs agentic workflows for hypothesis testing and scoring — built with provenance tracking, human-in-the-loop review, and full audit trails, so every conclusion is traceable.

projects.title: Multi-model LLM Aggregator
projects.description: A model-routing gateway across OpenAI, Claude, and Gemini with token accounting and fallback handling — provider abstraction and cost/latency control for a production LLM stack.

projects.title: NLP Hockey Scout
projects.description: A domain-tuned NLP pipeline applying a sports-specific transformer (SportsBERT) to pull sentiment signal from unstructured hockey commentary.

projects.title: Reinforcement-Learning Model Serving
projects.description: An end-to-end train-to-deploy loop: a Q-learning agent trained, containerized, and served behind a FastAPI + React interface — model-serving infrastructure shown on a classic RL problem.

projects.title: DK Design System Tool
projects.description: An internal design-token service with role-based access and JSON/XML APIs — one source of truth shared across design and engineering.
